transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Horizon Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know if a physical therapist near me, Dr. Alvarez, is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help. Are you calling about your medical plan or your dental plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Medical. It's for physical therapy, not dental.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. Just to confirm, are you calling about your medical plan or your dental plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Medical, like I said. It's the Bright Path Silver PPO plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, thank you. And is this regarding your medical plan or your dental plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Medical! I've said that three times now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. Let me just note that down. Can you confirm the provider's full name again?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Dr. Elena Alvarez, at Riverside Physical Therapy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. I'm having trouble pulling up that provider's network status right now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: So... is she in-network or not?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm unable to confirm that at this time. Thank you for calling Horizon Health Navigator, have a great day.
